author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

February Atlas Brew Schedule!

  February Schedule: 

• Economics - Monopolies in the Star Atlas universe (February 1)
• Politics - Multi-faction guilds part 2 (February 8)
• Game Structure - Crew Member Mechanics (February 15)
• Community Updates and Freestyle (February 22)

The events are live now at the top left of the server, if you'd like to hit the "interested" button to be notified when we're live!

 What is the Atlas Brew?

The Atlas Brew is a weekly community gathering, held on Wednesdays, where we discuss pre-determined topics, open-mic style, and have fun. We take notes during the Atlas Brew and give them to the team so your voice matters!
